title: Titan Armour® Premium Self-Locking & Adjustable, Adult Speed Skipping Rope | 2 x Steel Ropes, Cable Protector & Travel Case | Pro Jump Rope: Fitness, Crossfit, Boxing, MMA | UK Brand
features: FULL BODY WORKOUT - If you want to get the most out of your workout you need a jump rope that you can rely on. Our premium skipping rope will enable you to skip like a pro. We have used precision ball bearing rotation technology, to provide the optimum level of ‘whip’ required to skip smoother and faster, maximising your workout potential and providing the perfect strength training foundation, as well as getting you into great shape!

PREMIUM QUALITY & DESIGN - In true Titan Armour style we have used the highest quality components to not only look the part but feel the part too! Every component has been carefully considered and no corners have been cut, to ensure you have the best kit possible. We have used ergonomically designed aluminium handles for durability and added weight, included two different cable thicknesses for alternative levels of skipping, a cable protector to prolong the life of your rope as well as a tangle-free carry case.

MULTI-DISCIPLINE - Skipping is the perfect foundation for a variety of sports. If you are a Boxer, Crossfitter, Mixed Martial Artist or an all-round Fitness Fanatic and want to take your skipping to the next level, it is the perfect rope for you! Our jump rope has NO LIMITS when it comes to; basic jumps, double-unders, one-foot jumps and half-twists - take them all on at ease and with ultimate speed!

FUSS-FREE ADJUSTMENT - EASY TO USE & TRANSPORT - It’s clear that there is a wide range of options when it comes to skipping ropes. However, Titan Armour like to find the perfect blend of premium quality, ultimate performance and fuss-free functionality. That’s why we’ve ensured you can adjust your rope within seconds using it’s self-locking function, eliminating the need for any fiddly screws! We have also included an easily transportable pouch to ensure you can keep all parts together and keep your rope tangle and kink free!

SUPPORT A BRITISH COMPANY - Titan Armour is a small family run business based in the UK. We pride ourselves on our customer service and providing the customer with the best quality products. You can be reassured that we are here and happy to help! OUR PROMISE TO YOU - We are so confident in the quality of our product that we are offering a ONE YEAR WARRANTY should it no longer become functional to use.
